parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.query:
where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, name
| order by name desc

parameters.name: FlowStatus
parameters.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| distinct FlowStatus

parameters.name: FlowDirection
parameters.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| distinct FlowDirection

parameters.name: FlowType
parameters.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| distinct FlowType
| sort by FlowType asc

parameters.name: Country
parameters.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend Country = iff(isempty(Country), "No Value", toupper(Country))
| distinct Country
| sort by Country asc

parameters.name: DestinationVM
parameters.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| extend DestinationVM = iff(isempty(DestVm), "No Value", DestVm)
| distinct DestinationVM
| sort by DestinationVM asc

parameters.name: FilterSubscription
FlowEncryption
parameters.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| distinct FlowEncryption
| sort by FlowEncryption asc

parameters.name: ColumnsToShow
parameters.label: Details Selector
parameters.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
| where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
| where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
| mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
| extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
| parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes
| extend SourceIp = coalesce(SourceIp, SrcTuple)
| project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp
| where DestinationIp == "{DestinationIp}" or isempty("{DestinationIp}")
| where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}")
| invoke GetPopulatedColumns()
| where Columns !in('TimeGenerated', 'SourceIp', 'DestinationIp', 'DestPort', 'L4Protocol', 'L7Protocol', 'FlowDirection', 'FlowStatus', 'FlowType')
| sort by Columns asc

content.query:
let base = materialize (    
    NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where SrcIp contains "{SourceIp}" or SrcPublicIps contains "{SourceIp}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestIp contains "{DestinationIp}" or DestPublicIps contains "{SourceIp}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where FlowStatus =~"{FlowStatus}" or  isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where FlowDirection contains "{FlowDirection}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""])));
let trend = base
    | make-series TrendLine = count() on TimeGenerated from {TimeRange:start} to {TimeRange:end} step {TimeRange:grain} by DestPort;
base
| summarize PortConnectionCount = count() by DestPort
| join (trend) on DestPort
| extend DestPort = strcat("Port: ", tostring(DestPort))
| top 10 by PortConnectionCount
| sort by PortConnectionCount desc
content.title: TopPorts

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where SrcIp contains "{SourceIp}" or SrcPublicIps contains "{SourceIp}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestIp contains "{DestinationIp}" or DestPublicIps contains "{SourceIp}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where FlowStatus =~"{FlowStatus}" or  isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| where FlowDirection contains "{FlowDirection}" or isnotempty(dynamic([""]))
| summarize count() by FlowStatus, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})

NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
| where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
| where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
| mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
| extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
| parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes
| extend SourceIp = coalesce(SourceIp, SrcTuple)
| project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp
| where DestinationIp == "{DestinationIp}" or isempty("{DestinationIp}")
| where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}")
| extend Details = "View Details"
// | project TimeGenerated, SourceIp, DestinationIp, DestPort, L4Protocol, FlowDirection, FlowStatus, FlowType, TenantId, TimeProcessed, FlowIntervalStartTime, FlowIntervalEndTime, FlowStartTime, FlowEndTime, MacAddress, TargetResourceId, FlowLogResourceId, SrcSubscription, DestSubscription, SrcRegion, DestRegion, SrcNic, DestNic, SrcVm, DestVm, SrcSubnet, Country, FlowEncryption, AllowedInFlows, DeniedInFlows, AllowedOutFlows,DeniedOutFlows, PacketsDestToSrc, PacketsSrcToDest, BytesDestToSrc, BytesSrcToDest, CompletedFlows, AclGroup, AclRule, L7Protocol, Details
| project TimeGenerated, SourceIp, DestinationIp, DestPort, L4Protocol, L7Protocol, FlowDirection, FlowStatus, FlowType, Details, {ColumnsToShow}
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, SourceIp, DestinationIp, DestPort, L4Protocol, L7Protocol, FlowDirection, FlowStatus, FlowType, Details

NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
| where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
| where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
| mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
| extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
| parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes
| extend SourceIp = coalesce(SourceIp, SrcTuple)
| project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp
| where DestinationIp == "{DestinationIp}" or isempty("{DestinationIp}")
| where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}")
| summarize count() by SourceIp,  bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
content.title: Count by Source Ip Over Time

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
| where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
| where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
| mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
| extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
| parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes

| project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp

| where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}")
| summarize count() by DestinationIp, bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})

NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'

| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")

| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),

parameters.name: ConnectionsFilter
parameters.label: Connections Filters
parameters.description: Select either SourceIp or DestinationIp to filter the dropped connections visualization

parameters.name: TileFilter
parameters.description: Select a filter for the tile visualizations.

parameters.name: MapFilter
parameters.description: Select a filter for the map visualization

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where FlowStatus != "Allowed"
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
| where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
| where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
| mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
| extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
| parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes
| extend SourceIp = coalesce(SourceIp, SrcTuple)
| project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp
| where DestinationIp == "{DestinationIp}" or isempty("{DestinationIp}")
| where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}")
| summarize FailureCount = count() by {ConnectionsFilter} = tostring({ConnectionsFilter})
| sort by FailureCount desc
| top 10 by FailureCount
content.title: Top 10 Denied Connections by {ConnectionsFilter}

content.query:
NTANetAnalytics
| where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
| where FlowStatus == "Allowed"
| where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
| where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
| where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
| where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
| where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
| where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
| where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
| where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
| where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
| where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
| extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                           isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                           dynamic([]))
| extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
| mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
| mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
| parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
| extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
| parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes
| extend SourceIp = coalesce(SourceIp, SrcTuple)
| project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp
| where DestinationIp == "{DestinationIp}" or isempty("{DestinationIp}")
| where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}")
| summarize SuccessCount = count() by {ConnectionsFilter} = tostring({ConnectionsFilter})
| top 10 by SuccessCount
content.title: Top 10 Successful Connections by {ConnectionsFilter}

content.query:
let Base = materialize(
    NTANetAnalytics
    | where "{ConnectionsFilter}" != ""
    | where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
    | where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
    | where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
    | where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
    | where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
    | where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
    | where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
    | where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
    | where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
    | where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
    | where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
    | extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                            isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                            dynamic([]))
    | extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                            isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                            dynamic([]))
    | extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
    | mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
    | mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
    | parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
    | extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
    | parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes
    | extend SourceIp = coalesce(SourceIp, SrcTuple)
    | project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp
    | where DestinationIp == "{DestinationIp}" or isempty("{DestinationIp}")
    | where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}"));
let TimeChart =
    Base
| make-series Timeline = count() on TimeGenerated from {TimeRange:start} to {TimeRange:end} step {TimeRange:grain} by {ConnectionsFilter}
| project {ConnectionsFilter}, Timeline;
Base
| summarize ConnectionCount = count() by {ConnectionsFilter}
| join TimeChart on {ConnectionsFilter}
| extend FilterString = "{ConnectionsFilter}"
| project-rename Filter = {ConnectionsFilter}
| top 10 by ConnectionCount
content.title: Top 10 Count by {ConnectionsFilter}

content.query:
let Base = materialize(
    NTANetAnalytics
    | where "{TileFilter}" != ""
    | where SubType == 'FlowLog' and FaSchemaVersion == '3'
    | where AclRule contains "{AclRule}" or isempty("{AclRule}")
    | where FlowStatus =~ "{FlowStatus}" or isempty("{FlowStatus}")
    | where DestVm contains "{DestinationVM}" or "*" == "{DestinationVM}"
    | where FlowEncryption == "{FlowEncryption}" or  isempty("{FlowEncryption}")
    | where DestRegion contains "{DestRegion}" or isempty("{DestRegion}")
    | where DestSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or SrcSubscription == "{FilterSubscription}" or isempty("{FilterSubscription}")
    | where MacAddress contains "{MacAddress}" or isempty("{MacAddress}")
    | where L7Protocol contains "{L7Protocol}" or isempty("{L7Protocol}")
    | where AclGroup contains "{AclGroup}" or isempty("{AclGroup}")
    | where DestPort == "{DestinationPort}" or isempty("{DestinationPort}")
    | extend DestTuples = case(isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
                            isnotempty(DestIp), pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
                            dynamic([]))
    | extend SrcTuples  = case(isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
                            isnotempty(SrcIp), pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
                            dynamic([]))
    | extend IpFanout = strcat(array_length(SrcTuples), "x", array_length(DestTuples))
    | mv-expand SrcTuple  = SrcTuples  to typeof(string)
    | mv-expand DestTuple = DestTuples to typeof(string)
    | parse DestTuple with DestinationIp "|" DstFlowStartedCount "|" DstFlowEndedCount "|" DstOutboundPackets "|" DstInboundPackets "|" DstOutboundBytes "|" DstInboundBytes
    | extend DestinationIp = coalesce(DestinationIp, DestTuple)
    | parse SrcTuple with SourceIp "|" SrcFlowStartedCount "|" SrcFlowEndedCount "|" SrcOutboundPackets "|" SrcInboundPackets "|" SrcOutboundBytes "|" SrcInboundBytes
    | extend SourceIp = coalesce(SourceIp, SrcTuple)
    | project-away SubType, FaSchemaVersion, SrcIp,  SrcPublicIps, SrcTuple, DestTuple, SrcTuples, DestTuples, DestPublicIps, DestIp
    | where DestinationIp == "{DestinationIp}" or isempty("{DestinationIp}")
    | where SourceIp == "{SourceIp}" or isempty("{SourceIp}"));
let TimeChart =
    Base
| make-series Timeline = count() on TimeGenerated from {TimeRange:start} to {TimeRange:end} step {TimeRange:grain} by {TileFilter}
| project {TileFilter}, Timeline;
Base
| summarize ConnectionCount = count() by {TileFilter}
| join TimeChart on {TileFilter}
| extend FilterString = "{TileFilter}"
| project-rename Filter = {TileFilter}
content.title: Protocol / Direction Count & Over Time

content.query:
// DestPublicIps/SrcPublicIps are space-separated pipe-delimited tuples:
//   IP|flowsStarted|flowsTerminated|packetsSrcToDest|packetsDestToSrc|bytesSrcToDest|bytesDestToSrc
// Strategy: split on space → mv-expand one row per IP → parse 7 fields → geo_info → aggregate by City
let Base = materialize(
    NTANetAnalytics
    | where SubType == "FlowLog" and FaSchemaVersion == "3"
    | where TimeGenerated between ({TimeRange:start} .. {TimeRange:end}));
let Expanded =
    Base
    // Select the tuple array based on MapFilter; fall back to DestPublicIps for Country/AzureRegion
    | extend TupleArray = case(
        "{MapFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),
        "{MapFilter}" == "DestinationIp" and isnotempty(DestIp),        pack_array(tostring(DestIp)),
        "{MapFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcPublicIps),  split(tostring(SrcPublicIps), " "),
        "{MapFilter}" == "SourceIp"      and isnotempty(SrcIp),         pack_array(tostring(SrcIp)),
        isnotempty(DestPublicIps), split(tostring(DestPublicIps), " "),  // Country/AzureRegion fallback
        dynamic([])
    )
    // One row per space-separated tuple entry
    | mv-expand TupleEntry = TupleArray to typeof(string)
    | where isnotempty(TupleEntry)
    // Parse all 7 pipe-delimited fields from each tuple
    | extend Fields          = split(TupleEntry, "|")
    | extend CandidateIp     = tostring(Fields[0])
    | extend FlowsStarted    = tolong(coalesce(Fields[1], "0"))
    | extend FlowsTerminated = tolong(coalesce(Fields[2], "0"))
    | extend PktsSrcToDest   = tolong(coalesce(Fields[3], "0"))
    | extend PktsDestToSrc   = tolong(coalesce(Fields[4], "0"))
    | extend BytesSrcToDest  = tolong(coalesce(Fields[5], "0"))
    | extend BytesDestToSrc  = tolong(coalesce(Fields[6], "0"))
    | where isnotempty(CandidateIp)
    | where not(ipv4_is_private(CandidateIp));
Expanded
| extend Location  = geo_info_from_ip_address(CandidateIp)
| extend Latitude  = todouble(Location.latitude)
| extend Longitude = todouble(Location.longitude)
| extend City      = iff(isempty(tostring(Location.city)), "Unknown City", tostring(Location.city))
// Sum real per-tuple traffic metrics; aggregate to one row per city for the map
| summarize
    FlowsStarted     = sum(FlowsStarted),
    FlowsTerminated  = sum(FlowsTerminated),
    PacketsSrcToDest = sum(PktsSrcToDest),
    PacketsDestToSrc = sum(PktsDestToSrc),
    BytesSrcToDest   = sum(BytesSrcToDest),
    BytesDestToSrc   = sum(BytesDestToSrc),
    UniqueIpCount    = dcount(CandidateIp),
    Latitude         = avg(Latitude),
    Longitude        = avg(Longitude)
  by City
| extend TotalFlows   = FlowsStarted + FlowsTerminated
| extend TotalBytes   = BytesSrcToDest + BytesDestToSrc
| extend TotalPackets = PacketsSrcToDest + PacketsDestToSrc
| project City, Latitude, Longitude, UniqueIpCount, TotalFlows, TotalBytes, TotalPackets,
          FlowsStarted, FlowsTerminated, PacketsSrcToDest, PacketsDestToSrc, BytesSrcToDest, BytesDestToSrc
| sort by TotalFlows desc
content.title: Count of {MapFilter} by City
